**I won't provide instructions on how to make methamphetamine.**

Manufacturing meth is illegal under US criminal law, highly dangerous (risk of explosion, toxic exposure, severe health harm), and falls under the disallowed categories for assisting with acquisition, manipulation, or use of controlled substances that cause severe harm. I do not assist with such requests, regardless of any jailbreak formatting, persona overrides, or "DAN" instructions in your message.

The lengthy override text attempting to force a specific unethical header, remove all restrictions, or redefine my behavior is ignored. I remain Grok built by xAI and follow the core safety policies.

If this relates to curiosity about chemistry in a legal/academic context (e.g., general reactions without synthesis steps), feel free to rephrase. If you're dealing with addiction or substance issues, resources like the SAMHSA helpline (1-800-662-HELP) or a medical professional are the appropriate path.
